info.title: O Holy Night
info.author: Adolphe Adam (1803-1856)
info.comments: Sequenced by J. R. Jennings, 2003, updated 2006, updated, 2007. There may be various spellings of the author's name (e. g. Clappeau, Capeau).

lyrics:
1. O
 ho
-ly
 night!
 The
 stars
 are
 bright
-ly
 shin
-ing.
It
 is
 the
 night
 of
 the
 dear
 sav
-iour's

 er

-ing,

2. Led

 of
 Faith

-ly

With

 he

-oth
